params.name: Jade Cup
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Jan 17, 716 AD, famous poet Wang Han from Tang Dynasty wrote the famous poem "Cup of Moonlight" after getting drunk.

Chinese poet Wang Han and his friends always got drunk from drinking the wine in the Cup of Moonlight, a kind of foreign product. He wrote a poem, "Fine wine in a moonlight cup, as we raise them to lips, the pipa strikes up fast. Laugh not, as we get drunk on the battlefield, for how many soldiers have returned from the battlefield?" This cup was made with a special type of ja …
